_comment: Single source of truth for the AGT toolkit fork pin. Used by cli/src/lib/agt-bootstrap.ts to auto-clone when KARS_AGT_REPO is unset and ~/agent-governance-toolkit is missing. Update in lockstep with: Cargo.toml [patch.crates-io] rev, vendor/agt/microsoft-agent-governance-sdk-*.tgz tarball name, and {mesh-plugin,runtimes/openclaw}/package.json file: dep. When upstream PR #2772 merges to microsoft/agent-governance-toolkit main, repoint url+branch+sha to the upstream merge commit; when AGT cuts a release containing it, delete this file entirely and switch to the published npm/ghcr.io artifacts.
